sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sian'tho na'ng hun zang in, Thungen zel zel in
Ama sungah om in, A Thu,n kivak in,
Pasian' Tate pawl in, Anangte huh in.
Na khat nahih ciangin, Dong khial ngei kei in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sian'tho na'ng hun zang in, Mi a kin zongin.
Zeisu bek tawh omin, Hun tampi zang in.
Amah nasut na'ngin, Etteh tawntung in.
Ama lim langsak in, Nang'tatna pan in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sian'tho na'ng hun zang in, Hong pina zui-in
Amai ah tai kei in, Bang aci zongin
Na nuam na dah zongin, Topa mah zui-in
Zeisu en tawntung in, Ama thu muang in

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Sian'tho na'ng hun zang in, Lung hi dide in
Ngaihsut a namkimin, Amah uk sak in
Kha siangtho tua bangin, Ki kai sak lecin
vantung naseem dingin, Siam ding sawtlo in
